productDisplayName: Fila Men Terrindalo Black Casual Shoes
description: The fila Terindalo shoe is fila's reinterpretation of the classic sneaker. The brand comes up with yet another sleek and stylish low-top pair with this shoe. With minimal overlays, this shoe nails the simplistic mood of the moment. Wear this with your favourite denims and a T-shirt or with classic denims, a structured blazer and a monochrome tee. UpperSynthetic upper upper for lightweight comfort and absolute breathabilitySynthetic overlays strategically placed for added shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded and meshed tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and absolute shock absorptionFabric footbed for sweat-free wearOutsolePatterned TPR outsole with a suction point at the big toe region for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
